# Roadmap: Does DSSYK Have a Semiclassical dS Bulk Dual?

## Overview

This roadmap separates the problem into evidence gathering, positive-case reconstruction, and obstruction analysis before a final verdict. The objective is not to maximize the number of related papers mentioned, but to determine exactly what level of semiclassical bulk duality the primary-source literature currently supports.

## Contract Overview

| Contract Item | Advanced By Phase(s) | Status |
| ------------- | -------------------- | ------ |
| Final verdict on semiclassical dS bulk dual status | Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3 | Planned |
| Correlator and semiclassical-support evidence | Phase 1, Phase 2 | Planned |
| Entropy / Hilbert-space / temperature objections | Phase 1, Phase 3 | Planned |

## Phases

Phases will be added through `gpd phase add` so the CLI remains the source of truth for numbering and directories.
